title: Eyes on borrowing costs
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know about this week. US equities continued to rebound, but US borrowing costs rise as investors are getting more worried about inflation. Moody's became the third credit rating agency to strip the US of its perfect AAA status, due to concerns about growth and debt.
